foundry.name: Prophet Intelligence Foundry
foundry.boundaryNotes: Contract-first program for Prophet model data, training, post-training, RL, eval, release, and runtime promotion. It does not replace model-router, AgentPlane, Policy Fabric, Sociosphere, or SourceOS carry layers.

contractFamilies.name: ModelSpec
contractFamilies.purpose: Describe a Prophet model or compatible external model candidate before governance, routing, or SourceOS carry.

contractFamilies.name: DataManifest
contractFamilies.purpose: Record dataset/source/provenance/privacy/decontamination metadata for model training, eval, or synthetic data generation.

contractFamilies.name: TrainingRun
contractFamilies.purpose: Describe pretraining, continued-pretraining, SFT, preference optimization, RL, distillation, adapter tuning, or eval-only runs.

contractFamilies.name: EvalReport
contractFamilies.purpose: Summarize capability, reliability, autonomy, safety, cost, and regression evidence for a model/service candidate.

contractFamilies.name: ModelReleaseDecision
contractFamilies.purpose: Record release-stage approval, block, remediation, revocation, rollback, and required evidence references.

contractFamilies.name: ReasoningRuntimePlan
contractFamilies.purpose: Describe test-time compute mode, model graph, verifier policy, memory routing, tool policy, and computation budgets for a task.

contractFamilies.name: CapabilityGrant
contractFamilies.purpose: Represent bounded authority for an agent, task, tools, side effects, paths, policy hash, and expiry.

contractFamilies.name: RunCapsule
contractFamilies.purpose: Represent replayable agent execution evidence across prompt digests, model refs, retrieved context, tool calls, workspace lease, receipts, diffs, tests, and final artifacts.

contractFamilies.name: AgentMachineReceipt
contractFamilies.purpose: Represent machine-local runtime evidence for probing, placement, execution, model load/unload, cache reuse, and policy-mediated side effects.

contractFamilies.name: ToolContract
contractFamilies.purpose: Describe tool schemas, side effects, required capabilities, rollback strategy, and audit level before tool execution is admitted.

requiredRepositories.boundary: Defines model, dataset, eval, release, routing, guardrail, tool, agent, and promotion contracts.
Records dataset, run, eval, safety, promotion, rollback, factsheet, and compliance evidence.
Selects governed model/service routes; does not train, release, or mutate workspaces.
Provides guardrail policy around models, agents, tools, RAG packages, knowledge bases, and runtime deployment.
Carries approved signed model/service references, launch profiles, cache policy, and fallback references; no mutable model updates in OS images.
Owns runtime probing, inference provider lifecycle, model residency, cache-aware scheduling facts, AgentPod envelopes, and AgentMachineReceipt evidence.
Owns run lifecycle, validation, evidence capture, replay, and execution receipts.

promotionFlow.step: lab emits candidate functional service manifest
governance records evidence and release decision
routing admits a governed model/service route
Agent Machine emits runtime placement and execution receipts
AgentPlane binds receipts into replayable run capsules
